name: accordion
title: Accordion
description: shadcn accordion with Radix replaced by minimal vanilla JS. Accordion root + AccordionItem, single/multiple modes, CSS grid-rows height animation.

files.content: --- /** * AccordionItem.astro -- one collapsible row inside . Trigger * markup + panel; behaviour lives in the Accordion root's script. * * Height animation is the CSS grid-rows trick (0fr -> 1fr), so panels can * hold arbitrary content with no measured heights and no JS animation. * Chevron is an inlined lucide chevron-down (self-contained on purpose -- * primitives carry no icon dependency; icon *props* on richer components * use astro-icon). */ import { cn } from '../../lib/utils'; interface Props { title: string; /** Render this item expanded on load. */ open?: boolean; class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { title, open = false, class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---
